Pricing

Predictable pricing, no revenue tax

Free and open source to self-host. Move to managed Cloud when you want us to run it. Either way, we never take a cut of your revenue.

Open Source

Self-host the full engine on your own infrastructure.

Freeforever
  • Every feature — no paywalled add-ons
  • All payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay)
  • Usage metering & entitlements
  • GST, e-invoicing, EU VAT
  • Customer portal, API & webhooks
  • Unlimited everything
  • Community support
Get started on GitHub
Most popular

Cloud

Managed hosting — we run it, you ship.

$299/mo + usage

10,000 invoices & 5,000 subscriptions included

  • Everything in Open Source
  • Managed hosting & auto-scaling
  • Daily backups & SSL included
  • 99.9% uptime SLA
  • Email support
  • $0.02 / extra invoice · $0.05 / extra subscription
Join the Cloud waitlist

Enterprise

Dedicated infrastructure, compliance & SLAs.

Custom
  • Everything in Cloud
  • Dedicated infrastructure
  • SOC 2 & on-premise deployment
  • Custom integrations
  • Custom rate limits
  • Priority support with SLA
Contact sales

All prices in USD. Cloud is in early access — join the waitlist for onboarding.

Advanced add-ons

Usage-based, not revenue-based

A flat base plus predictable per-unit usage

Cloud is a $299/mo base fee — managed hosting, auto-scaling, daily backups, SSL, and email support — with generous allowances. You only pay more as you grow, at a fixed rate per invoice and subscription. No percentage of GMV, ever.

Worked example

Base (3,000 subs · 8,000 invoices)
$299
Scale to 7,000 subs · 15,000 invoices
+ $200
Total at that scale
$499/mo

5,000 extra invoices × $0.02 + 2,000 extra subs × $0.05.

Cloud add-ons

Pay only for what you need

Every add-on is included free in the open-source edition. On Cloud, turn on just the advanced capabilities you want.

Churn Prediction

+$99/mo

ML churn scoring per customer with high-risk alerts and retention workflows.

Advanced Analytics

+$49/mo

MRR waterfall, cohort retention, LTV & payback, scheduled report exports.

Accounting Sync

+$49/mo

Two-way sync with QuickBooks, Xero, Zoho & Tally — invoices, payments, credit notes.

Multi-Currency FX

+$79/mo

135+ currencies with daily FX rates, conversion at invoice time, gain/loss reporting.

FAQ

Common questions

Is the open-source version really free?

Yes — MIT licensed, every feature included, no paywall. You provide the infrastructure; you get everything.

How does Cloud usage pricing work?

The $299/mo base covers 10,000 invoices and 5,000 active subscriptions. Beyond that it’s $0.02 per invoice and $0.05 per subscription, billed monthly. API requests are rate-limited, not charged for overage.

Why are add-ons free in open source but paid on Cloud?

Self-hosting includes everything because you run the compute. On Cloud, add-ons like churn prediction need extra managed resources — the add-on price covers that.

Can I move between self-hosted and Cloud?

Both ways. We provide full data exports and a migration tool — you own your data, and there’s no lock-in.

Do you take a percentage of my revenue?

Never. Pricing is a flat base plus predictable per-unit usage — we don’t tax your revenue like the incumbents.

Start free tonight, upgrade when you're ready

Clone and self-host the whole engine, or get in line for managed Cloud.

Start self-hostingJoin the Cloud waitlist
recurso

The open-source billing engine for SaaS. Built with Go, PostgreSQL, and TigerBeetle. MIT licensed.
